alert.title: Bone-Throat Snarl
alert.description: Deeper chesty snarl with a stronger rattling jaw accent; selected for the live Bonejaw identity.

defensive.title: Bone-Click Burst
defensive.description: Fast reed-swipe launch with a compact jaw click; selected for the live defensive pounce.

impact.title: Bone Plate Thud
impact.description: Physical jaw-and-shoulder body hit with a concise bone click; selected for the live hunting impact.

alert.title: Jaw-Rattle Bark
alert.description: Short territorial bark with a clear bone-jaw chatter on the front edge.

alert.title: Bone-Throat Snarl
alert.description: Deeper chesty snarl with a stronger rattling jaw accent; selected for the live Bonejaw identity.

alert.title: Hollow Warning Yip
alert.description: Sharper nasal warning call with less weight and a slightly more feral yip-like top end.

defensive.title: Bone-Click Burst
defensive.description: Fast reed-swipe launch with a compact jaw click; selected for the live defensive pounce.

defensive.title: Reed Lash Lunge
defensive.description: Airier lash-forward cue with more hiss and less bony snap.

defensive.title: Jaw-Rasp Feint
defensive.description: More abrasive jaw-rasp burst that reads mean but slightly noisier than the chosen live cue.

impact.title: Bone Plate Thud
impact.description: Physical jaw-and-shoulder body hit with a concise bone click; selected for the live hunting impact.

impact.title: Jaw Crack Snap
impact.description: Sharper contact crack with less body weight and more top-end snap.

impact.title: Shoulder Slam
impact.description: Heavier bodily slam with less bone articulation and a duller landing read.
